mapper.select: SELECT cs.id AS id, cs.course_id AS courseId, cs.student_id AS studentId, u.real_name AS studentName, cs.student_no AS studentNo, cs.joined_at AS joinedAt, cs.progress AS progress FROM course_students cs INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = cs.student_id WHERE cs.course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY cs.joined_at DESC, cs.id DESC

SELECT u.id AS id, u.username AS username, u.real_name AS realName, sp.student_no AS studentNo, sp.grade AS grade, sp.class_name AS className FROM users u INNER JOIN student_profiles sp ON sp.student_id = u.id WHERE u.role = 'student' AND u.status <> 'inactive' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM course_students cs WHERE cs.course_id = #{courseId} AND cs.student_id = u.id )
AND ( u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR sp.student_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY u.created_at DESC, u.id DESC
